nodes.name: ruvix
nodes.summary: RuVix Cognition Kernel: capability-based microhypervisor for AI agents with 12 syscalls, 6 primitives, proof-gated mutation, and no_std support; Cargo workspace with 24 member crates plus tests/benches/examples.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Workspace manifest declaring 24 ruvix-* member crates (types, region, queue, cap, proof, sched, boot, vecgraph, nucleus, hal, aarch64, drivers, smp, physmem, dma, dtb, net, fs, bcm2711, rpi-boot, shell, cli) plus qemu-swarm, tests, benches, and cognitive_demo example.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level RuVix documentation: motivation vs Linux/seL4/Zephyr, six kernel primitives, twelve syscalls, three proof tiers (Reflex <10us, Standard ~100us, Deep ~1ms), crate overview across Phases A-E, and ADR-087 cross-reference.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo build configuration pinning the custom aarch64-ruvix.json target with rust-lld linker, QEMU virt+cortex-a72 runner, and unstable build-std for core/alloc with compiler-builtins-mem.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: AArch64 bare-metal boot infrastructure docs: memory layout (0x40000000 base, 128MiB RAM, 64KiB stack), linker.ld sections, QEMU virt memory map, build/run/debug Make targets, and Rust target spec details.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script that re-runs on linker.ld changes and injects -Tlinker.ld as a rustc link argument.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Build-script entry point emitting cargo:rerun-if-changed and rustc-link-arg directives for the custom linker script.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: ruvix-bench crate manifest: 5 binaries (ruvix-vs-linux, syscall-bench, proof-overhead, throughput-bench, memory-bench) and 4 criterion benches; depends on ruvix-nucleus/types/cap/region/queue plus criterion, clap, hdrhistogram, tabled, sysinfo, nix, libc.

nodes.name: linux_comparison.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark harness contrasting RuVix syscalls (cap_grant, queue_send, region_map, timer_wait) against Linux equivalents (getuid, pipe write, mmap, clock_gettime, SELinux/seccomp simulation).

nodes.name: setup_kernel
nodes.summary: Test helper that constructs a default Kernel, boots it, and primes the current-time clock for benchmarking.

nodes.name: bench_ruvix_cap_grant
nodes.summary: Measures RuVix Syscall::CapGrant latency by issuing READ rights from a root capability to a synthetic target task.

nodes.name: bench_ruvix_queue_send
nodes.summary: Measures Syscall::QueueSend throughput with an 8-byte normal-priority message.

nodes.name: bench_ruvix_region_map
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::RegionMap for a 4KB immutable region using a null capability.

nodes.name: bench_ruvix_timer_wait
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::TimerWait with zero-deadline TimerSpec to measure fast-path timer dispatch.

nodes.name: compare_capability
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark group pitting RuVix cap_grant against Linux getuid/geteuid/getgid/getegid sequence as capability-check proxy.

nodes.name: compare_ipc
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark group comparing RuVix queue_send against Linux pipe writes with a reader-thread drain.

nodes.name: compare_memory
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark group comparing RuVix region_map against Linux mmap/munmap on 4KB anonymous private pages.

nodes.name: compare_timer
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark group comparing RuVix timer_wait against Linux clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC).

nodes.name: proof_tiers.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark exploring proof-tier overhead across Reflex/Standard/Deep with vector and graph mutations and vector-dimension scaling (4/64/256/768).

nodes.name: bench_reflex_tier
nodes.summary: Microbenchmarks VectorPutProved at Reflex tier with rotating nonces and 4-dimensional vectors.

nodes.name: bench_standard_tier
nodes.summary: Microbenchmarks GraphApplyProved add_node mutations at Standard proof tier.

nodes.name: bench_deep_tier
nodes.summary: Microbenchmarks VectorPutProved at Deep proof tier to quantify worst-case verification cost.

nodes.name: bench_proof_tiers_vector
nodes.summary: Criterion group iterating over all three proof tiers for vector_put with Throughput::Elements(1).

nodes.name: bench_proof_tiers_graph
nodes.summary: Criterion group iterating over all three proof tiers for graph add_node mutations.

nodes.name: bench_proof_creation
nodes.summary: Measures the isolated overhead of Kernel::create_proof at each tier without dispatching a syscall.

nodes.name: bench_proof_with_vector_sizes
nodes.summary: Scaling benchmark applying Reflex-tier VectorPutProved across dimensions 4/64/256/768 with Throughput::Bytes.

nodes.name: bench_linux_security_overhead
nodes.summary: Compares RuVix Reflex-tier proof cost against simulated Linux SELinux (10 checks) and seccomp (1 check) overhead.

nodes.name: syscall_benches.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion harness benchmarking each of the 12 RuVix syscalls individually plus proof-tier and vector-dimension scaling groups.

nodes.name: bench_task_spawn
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::TaskSpawn with a root RvfComponentId, empty caps, normal priority, and no deadline.

nodes.name: bench_cap_grant
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::CapGrant after creating a root RvfMount capability.

nodes.name: bench_region_map
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::RegionMap with a real Region root capability and Immutable policy.

nodes.name: bench_queue_send
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::QueueSend with an 8-byte normal-priority payload.

nodes.name: bench_queue_recv
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::QueueRecv with a 4KB buffer and zero timeout.

nodes.name: bench_timer_wait
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::TimerWait with zero-ms deadline.

nodes.name: bench_rvf_mount
nodes.summary: Benchmarks proof-gated Syscall::RvfMount with a 32-byte zero blob at /test using a root RvfMount cap.

nodes.name: bench_vector_get
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::VectorGet after pre-populating a 4-dim 100-cap vector store with one entry.

nodes.name: bench_vector_put_proved
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::VectorPutProved at Reflex tier with rotating 100-entry slot reuse.

nodes.name: bench_graph_apply_proved
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::GraphApplyProved add_node mutations at Standard proof tier.

nodes.name: bench_sensor_subscribe
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::SensorSubscribe with a default SensorDescriptor and a target queue handle.

nodes.name: bench_proof_tiers
nodes.summary: Criterion group running VectorPutProved across all three proof tiers for parameter comparison.

nodes.name: bench_vector_dimensions
nodes.summary: Criterion group scaling VectorPutProved over dims 4/64/256/768 to characterize copy-and-hash overhead.

nodes.name: throughput.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion harness measuring sustained throughput across IPC sizes, vector dimensions, graph mutations, an end-to-end perception pipeline, and a RuVix-vs-Linux pipeline comparison.

nodes.name: bench_ipc_throughput
nodes.summary: Measures Syscall::QueueSend throughput across 8B-4KB message sizes using Throughput::Bytes.

nodes.name: bench_linux_ipc_throughput
nodes.summary: Measures Linux pipe write throughput across 8B-4KB message sizes with a draining reader thread.

nodes.name: bench_vector_throughput
nodes.summary: Measures VectorPutProved throughput across dimensions 4/64/256/768 with a 10K-capacity store.

nodes.name: bench_vector_get_throughput
nodes.summary: Measures VectorGet throughput across dimensions on a 100-entry pre-populated store with round-robin key rotation.

nodes.name: bench_graph_throughput
nodes.summary: Measures GraphApplyProved add_node throughput at Standard proof tier.

nodes.name: bench_perception_pipeline
nodes.summary: End-to-end pipeline benchmark: queue_send (sensor event) -> vector_put (embedding) -> graph_apply (knowledge update).

nodes.name: bench_sustained_throughput
nodes.summary: Sustained-load benchmark using iter_custom and a 100K vector store for 5-second measurement windows.

nodes.name: bench_linux_pipeline_simulation
nodes.summary: Side-by-side benchmark group comparing the RuVix queue/vector/graph pipeline against a Linux pipe+file+fsync pipeline.

nodes.name: memory_bench.rs
nodes.summary: CLI binary using sysinfo and tabled to report kernel data-structure footprints (Task/Capability/Region/Queue) and per-workload memory vs Linux equivalents.

nodes.name: Args
nodes.summary: clap Parser-derived CLI flags struct for memory_bench.

nodes.name: MemoryRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row capturing a workload's RuVix vs Linux memory footprint and reduction percentage.

nodes.name: StructureRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row reporting per-structure sizes for kernel objects.

nodes.name: format_bytes
nodes.summary: Formats byte counts in B/KB/MB units.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that parses Args, gathers system info via sysinfo, prints structure-size and per-workload memory tables.

nodes.name: proof_overhead.rs
nodes.summary: CLI binary that runs proof-tier and vector-dimension benchmarks and prints per-tier overhead plus Linux-comparison tables.

nodes.name: Args
nodes.summary: clap Parser CLI flags for proof_overhead binary.

nodes.name: TierRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row capturing latency and overhead per proof tier.

nodes.name: ComparisonRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row comparing RuVix proof tier latency against Linux security overhead.

nodes.name: format_duration
nodes.summary: Formats nanosecond floats into human-readable ns/us/ms strings.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point running proof-tier benches and vector-dimension scaling, then rendering tabled output.

nodes.name: ruvix_vs_linux.rs
nodes.summary: Master CLI orchestrator running the full RuVix-vs-Linux suite (syscalls, comparisons, memory, target verification) and emitting markdown/JSON reports.

nodes.name: Args
nodes.summary: clap Parser CLI flags for the master ruvix_vs_linux binary (output path, format selectors, iteration counts).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point: configures bench configs, runs RuVix and Linux suites, summarizes comparisons, and writes report files.

nodes.name: syscall_bench.rs
nodes.summary: CLI binary running all RuVix syscall benchmarks and printing tabled latency/percentile results vs ADR-087 targets.

nodes.name: Args
nodes.summary: clap Parser CLI flags for syscall_bench.

nodes.name: ResultRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row reporting per-syscall mean/p50/p95/p99 latencies.

nodes.name: format_duration
nodes.summary: Formats nanosecond floats into ns/us/ms strings for tabled output.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that runs ruvix::bench_all_syscalls and prints results plus ADR-087 target verification.

nodes.name: throughput_bench.rs
nodes.summary: CLI binary that drives RuVix syscall throughput benchmarks over wall-clock windows for capability, IPC, vector, graph, and pipeline workloads.

nodes.name: Args
nodes.summary: clap Parser CLI flags for throughput_bench.

nodes.name: ThroughputRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row capturing total ops, duration, and ops/sec for a workload.

nodes.name: format_rate
nodes.summary: Formats ops/sec into K/M/B suffixed strings.

nodes.name: format_duration
nodes.summary: Formats nanosecond durations for tabled output.

nodes.name: setup_kernel
nodes.summary: Constructs and boots a default Kernel with a fixed start time.

nodes.name: run_throughput_bench
nodes.summary: Generic harness running a closure repeatedly for a wall-clock duration and reporting total ops, elapsed time, and rate.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point running queue/vector/graph/pipeline throughput passes and rendering tabled output.

nodes.name: comparison.rs
nodes.summary: Maps RuVix syscalls to Linux equivalents, orchestrates paired benchmark runs, and produces comparison and summary structures used by report generators.

nodes.name: ComparisonMapping
nodes.summary: Static mapping between a RuVix syscall name, its Linux equivalent, and a descriptive category for reporting.

nodes.name: run_all_comparisons
nodes.summary: Runs the full set of paired RuVix vs Linux benchmarks (Unix build) or stub equivalents (non-Unix) and returns a Vec<Comparison>.

nodes.name: generate_memory_comparisons
nodes.summary: Produces hard-coded memory-footprint comparisons (Task vs process, capability vs file descriptor, region vs mapping, etc.).

nodes.name: ComparisonSummary
nodes.summary: Aggregated counts and average speedups across all comparisons plus a memory-reduction summary.

nodes.name: from_comparisons
nodes.summary: Constructor that folds latency and memory comparisons into mean speedups and reduction percentages.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruvix-bench library root: declares modules (stats, ruvix, linux, comparison, report, targets), defines BenchmarkResult, Comparison, MemoryComparison primitives, and a target_for lookup table.

nodes.name: target_for
nodes.summary: Maps a syscall name to its ADR-087 performance target Duration if one is specified.

nodes.name: BenchmarkResult
nodes.summary: Holds aggregated latency statistics (count, min/max/mean/p50/p95/p99, std-dev) for a single benchmark.

nodes.name: from_measurements
nodes.summary: Builds a BenchmarkResult from raw nanosecond measurements using the stats module.

nodes.name: speedup_over
nodes.summary: Computes the mean-latency speedup of self over another BenchmarkResult.

nodes.name: Comparison
nodes.summary: Pairs a RuVix benchmark with a Linux counterpart for side-by-side reporting.

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: Comparison constructor capturing category, operation name, and both BenchmarkResult sides.

nodes.name: MemoryComparison
nodes.summary: Memory-footprint comparison record (operation, RuVix bytes, Linux bytes, descriptive notes).

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: MemoryComparison constructor capturing the four input fields and computing the reduction percentage.

nodes.name: linux.rs
nodes.summary: Unix-only Linux syscall benchmark suite: capability, setuid, pipe read/write, mmap/munmap, clone simulation, clock_gettime, write+fsync, SELinux simulation, and socket send.

nodes.name: LinuxBenchConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs (warmup, iterations, output paths) for Linux-side benchmarks.

nodes.name: bench_linux_capability_check
nodes.summary: Times libc::getuid/geteuid/getgid/getegid sequences as a capability-check proxy.

nodes.name: bench_linux_setuid_simulation
nodes.summary: Simulates the cost of a setuid-style privilege transition with paired libc calls.

nodes.name: bench_linux_pipe_write
nodes.summary: Measures Linux pipe write latency with a drained reader thread.

nodes.name: bench_linux_pipe_read
nodes.summary: Measures Linux pipe read latency with a writer thread continuously feeding data.

nodes.name: bench_linux_mmap
nodes.summary: Measures Linux mmap+munmap round-trip latency on anonymous private 4KB pages.

nodes.name: bench_linux_munmap
nodes.summary: Measures isolated munmap latency on pre-mapped pages.

nodes.name: bench_linux_clone_simulation
nodes.summary: Simulates clone/fork overhead via libc identity calls without actually spawning processes.

nodes.name: bench_linux_clock_gettime
nodes.summary: Measures clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC) latency.

nodes.name: bench_linux_write_fsync
nodes.summary: Measures Linux write followed by fsync as a durability-cost benchmark.

nodes.name: bench_linux_write_only
nodes.summary: Measures Linux write without fsync to isolate the cost of durability.

nodes.name: bench_linux_selinux_simulation
nodes.summary: Simulates SELinux policy lookup overhead with ten libc identity calls.

nodes.name: bench_linux_socket_send
nodes.summary: Measures UNIX-domain socket send latency between a producer and a drained reader.

nodes.name: bench_all_linux
nodes.summary: Convenience function running every Linux benchmark and collecting the BenchmarkResults; non-Unix stub returns an empty vector.

nodes.name: report.rs
nodes.summary: Tabled row adapters and renderers producing Markdown, console, and JSON benchmark reports from syscall, comparison, memory, and target data.

nodes.name: SyscallRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row presenting a BenchmarkResult with name, latency percentiles, and target verdict.

nodes.name: ComparisonRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row presenting a side-by-side RuVix-vs-Linux comparison with speedup.

nodes.name: MemoryRow
nodes.summary: Tabled row capturing a MemoryComparison for tabular rendering.

nodes.name: generate_markdown_report
nodes.summary: Renders a comprehensive Markdown report aggregating syscall results, comparisons, memory data, summary, and target verification.

nodes.name: print_console_report
nodes.summary: Prints a colourized console report using the console crate (styles, term width detection).

nodes.name: generate_json_report
nodes.summary: Renders the same benchmark data as a structured serde_json::Value suitable for machine consumption.

nodes.name: ruvix.rs
nodes.summary: RuVix-side benchmark suite: per-syscall benches plus aggregate bench_all_syscalls, proof-tier scaling, and vector-dimension scaling helpers backed by a shared BenchConfig.

nodes.name: setup_kernel
nodes.summary: Boots a default Kernel with a primed current-time clock for benchmarking.

nodes.name: BenchConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration (warmup, iterations, etc.) shared across RuVix-side benchmark runners.

nodes.name: run_benchmark
nodes.summary: Generic harness running a closure for warmup+measurement iterations and producing a BenchmarkResult.

nodes.name: bench_task_spawn
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::TaskSpawn with default parameters.

nodes.name: bench_cap_grant
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::CapGrant after creating a root RvfMount capability.

nodes.name: bench_region_map
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::RegionMap for an immutable 4KB region.

nodes.name: bench_queue_send
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::QueueSend with an 8-byte normal-priority message.

nodes.name: bench_queue_recv
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::QueueRecv with a 4KB buffer and zero timeout.

nodes.name: bench_timer_wait
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::TimerWait with zero-ms deadline.

nodes.name: bench_rvf_mount
nodes.summary: Benchmarks proof-gated Syscall::RvfMount with a 32-byte zero blob at /test.

nodes.name: bench_vector_get
nodes.summary: Pre-populates a vector store and benchmarks Syscall::VectorGet.

nodes.name: bench_vector_put_proved
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::VectorPutProved at Reflex tier with rotating slot reuse.

nodes.name: bench_graph_apply_proved
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::GraphApplyProved add_node mutations at Standard proof tier.

nodes.name: bench_sensor_subscribe
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Syscall::SensorSubscribe with a default SensorDescriptor and an RvfMount capability.

nodes.name: bench_all_syscalls
nodes.summary: Runs every individual RuVix syscall benchmark and returns the combined Vec<BenchmarkResult>.

nodes.name: bench_proof_tiers
nodes.summary: Benchmarks VectorPutProved at Reflex, Standard, and Deep tiers and returns (name, BenchmarkResult) pairs.

nodes.name: bench_vector_dimensions
nodes.summary: Benchmarks VectorPutProved over dimensions 4/64/256/768 and returns (dims, BenchmarkResult) pairs.

nodes.name: stats.rs
nodes.summary: Statistics utilities: Stats struct (min/max/mean/percentiles/std-dev), LatencyHistogram wrapping hdrhistogram, ThroughputStats, and a paired-sample significance test.

nodes.name: Stats
nodes.summary: Summary statistics container with count, min/max/mean/std-dev, and p50/p95/p99 fields.

nodes.name: from_measurements
nodes.summary: Computes Stats from a slice of nanosecond floats.

nodes.name: LatencyHistogram
nodes.summary: Wrapper around hdrhistogram::Histogram providing record/record_all, percentile queries, merge, and reset.

nodes.name: HistogramStats
nodes.summary: Frozen snapshot of LatencyHistogram statistics for reporting.

nodes.name: ThroughputStats
nodes.summary: Throughput summary capturing operations, bytes, duration, ops/sec, and bytes/sec.

nodes.name: calculate_speedup
nodes.summary: Returns baseline_mean / optimized_mean as a speedup factor.

nodes.name: is_significant
nodes.summary: Performs a simple two-sample significance test at a given confidence level.

nodes.name: targets.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-087 performance-target specs (TargetSpec, ProofTierSpec) and runtime verification helpers (TargetVerification, TargetSummary) with pass-rate computation.

nodes.name: TargetSpec
nodes.summary: Performance target spec for a single syscall (name and p95 target Duration).

nodes.name: ProofTierSpec
nodes.summary: Enum capturing the three proof-tier latency budgets used in ADR-087.

nodes.name: spec_for
nodes.summary: Looks up the TargetSpec for a given syscall name from a static table.

nodes.name: TargetVerification
nodes.summary: Captures an actual p95 Duration vs target Duration and computes pass/fail status.

nodes.name: TargetSummary
nodes.summary: Aggregates many TargetVerification results and computes the overall pass rate.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for the ruvix-aarch64 sub-crate (no_std AArch64 support per ADR-087) declaring path dependencies on ruvix-types and ruvix-hal plus permissive lint settings.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the ruvix-aarch64 crate: exception vector tables (VBAR_EL1), context-switch ExceptionContext layout, page-table primitives, and integration with HAL.

nodes.name: boot.rs
nodes.summary: AArch64 early boot path: unsafe extern "C" early_init that installs vector base, configures SCTLR_EL1, prepares the MMU, then transfers to kernel_main.

nodes.name: early_init
nodes.summary: Unsafe extern "C" boot entry: sets VBAR_EL1, reads/writes SCTLR_EL1, prepares the MMU object, and hands off to kernel_main; diverging (-> !).

nodes.name: kernel_main
nodes.summary: Diverging extern "C" kernel_main entry point invoked after early_init completes; expected to be replaced by the linked-in kernel image's main.
